summary: Stocks slightly lower on April 29, 2026. Dow fell 280 points (-0.57%) to 48,861 for a 5th straight losing day. Oil prices climbed on U.S. blockade of Iranian ports. AI chip stocks (Seagate +18%) led gainers. OpenAI revenue miss weighed on tech. Mag-7 earnings due after bell.
